name: Festive Lamb Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Use twice the amount of rib or loin chops in place of thick ones.
2. Broil chops until brown on one side.
3. Turn and broil on the other side until brown.
4. Trim cheese to chop size.
5. Place onion and cheese slices on each chop.
6. Continue broiling until cheese begins to melt.
